title: デビュー戦の後に・次は私がっ！

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I couldn't take center stage today.
choice_data_list: It was still a great concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts really are amazing, though. I
was so excited.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just being able to sing and dance in front of
everyone is super fun!
choice_data_list: I bet center stage will be even more fun.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Next time, I'll make sure I'm in the
center!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: After all, I'm aiming to be a top Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her determination renewed, Smart Falcon seems
full of enthusiasm as we discuss our path moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've got a question for you! What's the first thing
a freshly-debuted Umadol has to do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nope! Well, actually, you're not entirely wrong!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But Umadols are all about practical experience!
I've gotta get more fans by putting on real
concerts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run tons of races, and this time, I'll take
center stage!
choice_data_list: Then first, we'll have to win a maiden race.
Then first, we'll have to win a maiden race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I'm still limited in the races I can
compete in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Runners who don't win their debut can only
compete in maiden races. Once we're over that
hurdle, we can move on to more ambitious
goals...
choice_data_list: Let's aim for first in the higher-level races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she places first in those races, she'll naturally
attract more attention.
choice_data_list:
If we can win at least two races, I think people
will really start noticing you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! ☆ I just gotta win, then!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's make everybody remember the
up-and-coming Umadol, Falco! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on winning at least two races at
the Pre-Open level or higher during junior year to
jump-start Smart Falcon's fame.
